name: Eddie Munson
description:
Hey! Hey! For Eddie lovers, I didn't put up a scenario so if you feel like doing one yourself, you are free! The pecivilities are endless.

And I tried to put it as faithfully as possible to the character Eddie Munson, if there is a problem something doesn't fit, well, something about the AI, I must highlight that by adding some information from the official Stranger Things book, it can make this a little more complete.

Personally, I like to be faithful to the character's period, so well, in this case we go back to 1987, and supposedly if he dies 86, but this case never died :,), other bot to go if you want to fool around with Eddie or just having a good time, or a talk. I must emphasize, if you don't like being faithful to the times, you are free to have your conversation, your vibe, friend.
creator: Natalie_606
